data.content: Approved implementation review in ../foolery. Reviewed commit 55706664f98f on branch knots-2412-acceptance-field: toBeat() now uses native acceptance when present and falls back to legacy acceptance notes when knots core returns acceptance:null. Verified regression coverage for both null-with-note and null-without-note cases, and ran corepack pnpm -C ../foolery test -- --runInBand src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-coverage.test.ts with the unit suite passing (157 files, 2161 tests passed).
